fix: Template ships .excn/progress/ and .excn/runtime/ via .gitkeep on every init; stamp-policy adds both to WORK_TRACKING_DIR_PREFIXES so update classes them work-tracking and never touches records inside. Commit 7e4a7d8. code-standards + package-qa PASS.
title: Two homes stamped: Template ships .excn/progress/ and .excn/runtime/, stamp policy classes them work-tracking
description: The Template ships the two Progress Record / Runtime Record homes of ADR-0008: .excn/progress/ (agent- and gate-written) and .excn/runtime/ (hook-written), present on every fresh init. The stamp policy classifies both as work-tracking so update never touches their contents. The stamped .excn gitignore continues to match *_progress.json at any depth with no change. End-to-end: init a temp dir, both homes exist, update leaves files placed in them untouched.
acceptance_criteria: stamp policy classifies both directories as work-tracking (update never refreshes or drift-reports their contents)
Existing *_progress.json gitignore line covers records inside both homes with no gitignore edit
Src-First: lands in src/ first, dogfood root mirrors
